---
title: "Computational Math"
author: Apurva Nakade
date: 2026-07-14
listing:
  contents: "/*/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 Apurva Nakade. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Apurva Nakade
-->

Computational math covers numerical methods for problems that rarely have closed-form solutions: finding roots of equations, interpolating between sample points, and approximating solutions to differential equations. Each topic below pairs a short introduction with interactive apps so you can see how a method behaves as its inputs change.
